sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Zinpa kong kiangah om hi, lutsak in! (Honpa, lutsak in!)
Tamveipi hong paizo hi, lutsak in!
(Honpa, lutsak in!)
Apaima’n lut na’ng pia in, Siangtho Topa lutsak in;
Pa Pasian a
Tapa hi, lutsak in! (Honpa, lutsak in!)

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Lungsim kongkhak tu’n hon in, lutsak in!
(Honpa, lutsak in!)
Ngak leh Amah paikhia ding, lutsak in! (Honpa, lutsak in!)
Lutsak in nang ma
lawmpa, Nangma lungsim kem dinga;
A tawp dong hong gum dingpa, lutsak in! (Honpa, lutsak
in!)

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: A kam khum na ngai inla, lutsak in! (Honpa, lutsak in!)
Tu’n piangsak in
nang teelpa, lutsak in! (Honpa, lutsak in!)
Kong khak kiang ding hi, Amah khangsak ding na
lungdamna;
Ama min na phat dinga, lutsak in! (Honpa, lutsak in!)

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Tu-in vantung khua
zinpa, lutsak in! (Honpa, lutsak in!)
Nang vakna pawi khawm dinga, lutsak in! (Honpa, lutsak
in!)
A hong phel ding na mawhna, lawmte tawh kikhen ciangin;
Hong kha ding vantung inn-ah, lutsak
in! (Honpa, lutsak in!)
